name: Google Drive (npx)
description: Search and read Google Drive files and read/update Google Sheets via OAuth. Provides gdrive_search, gdrive_read_file, gsheets_read, and gsheets_update_cell tools, plus gdrive:/// file resources.

inputs.label: Google OAuth Client ID
inputs.description: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from a Google Cloud 'Desktop App' OAuth client. Enable the Google Drive API, Google Sheets API, and Google Docs API, then create OAuth credentials. Found in the Google Cloud Console under APIs & Services > Credentials.

obtain.instructions:
1. Open the Google Cloud Console and create or select a project
2. Under APIs & Services > Library, enable the Google Drive API, Google Sheets API, and Google Docs API
3. Configure the OAuth consent screen
4. Under APIs & Services > Credentials, click 'Create Credentials' > 'OAuth client ID'
5. Choose application type 'Desktop App'
6. Copy the Client ID shown after creation

inputs.label: Google OAuth Client Secret
inputs.description: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret paired with the Client ID from your Google Cloud 'Desktop App' OAuth client. Found alongside the Client ID under APIs & Services > Credentials.

obtain.instructions:
1. Open the Google Cloud Console and select your project
2. Go to APIs & Services > Credentials
3. Open the OAuth 2.0 Client ID you created ('Desktop App')
4. Copy the Client Secret value

inputs.label: Credentials Directory
inputs.description: Absolute path to a writable directory where the server stores OAuth tokens and credentials. On first run a browser OAuth flow saves the token here. Place your downloaded OAuth keys file (renamed to gcp-oauth.keys.json) in this directory.

auth.instructions: Create a Google Cloud project, enable the Google Drive API, Google Sheets API, and Google Docs API, then create a 'Desktop App' OAuth 2.0 Client ID at https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials. Provide the Client ID and Client Secret, and set a credentials directory. The first run opens a browser to authorize the drive.readonly and spreadsheets scopes and caches the token in that directory.
